report.summary: Hourly standup: traffic steady, publish queue healthy, design polish cycle just landed — focus next hour on content velocity.

sections.title: Analytics
items: Traffic flat-to-up vs prior cycle; no anomalies in top pages
Search Console: 'liberation day anniversary' and 'eth foundation staking' gaining impressions after fresh social cards
No pages showing sudden rank loss; core tools (DCA, APY) stable

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Carry-over: design polish cycle completed this hour (2026-04-09-design.json)
Publish cycle ran earlier today — queue drained on schedule
No open blockers detected in reports/ folder
Pending: standup → build cycle handoff for next rotation

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1. Kick off build cycle — prioritize content pages riding the liberation-day tailwind
2. Ship one more comparison/learn page targeting rising SC keywords
3. Monitor freshly-polished social cards for CTR lift on X/Farcaster
